metadata.description: QuantumAgent marketplace — 4-scale quantum architecture for Claude Code

plugins.name: cosmos
plugins.description: 4-scale quantum architecture for AI-assisted development. v4.0 completes the original vision by adding the micro (code) scale: /cosmos scan detects code-tunnel (type-system bypasses), code-decoherence (untested files), code-superposition (feature flags), code-jump (high churn). Plus the existing cosmos scale (CLI + YAML DSL), project scale (spin + singularities), and Python primitives layer with canonical quantum mechanics (CHSH, gates, density matrices, decoherence).
